units.content: a time-ordered sequence of refuted-echo-chamber signals attributed to each measurer is read from the append-only event log
a decay-weighted aggregate of refuted-echo-chamber signals is computed over a configurable time window
the aggregated value is emitted as the trust-weight argument optionally consumed by the measurer-correlation analyser
the per-measurer trust weight is the product of reading, decay-weighting, and emitting the aggregated refuted-echo-chamber signals
routing the trust-weight loop through the event log rather than through mutation of prior coupling entries results in the trust-weight loop operating via the append-only log
it is architecturally significant that the trust-weight loop operates through the event log rather than by mutating prior coupling entries
